title: Stage 04 Build Gate
description: Stage 4 (Build) gate. Workstream gates land at pipeline/gates/stage-04.<role>.json (one per role: backend, frontend, platform, qa) and the orchestrator merges them into pipeline/gates/stage-04.json with a workstreams[] array. Per-workstream gates carry the stage-specific fields below; the merged gate also conforms to base gate.schema.json.

pr_summaries_written.description: Paths to pipeline/pr-<role>.md files this dev produced; reviewers read these at Stage 5.

local_verification.description: Commands the dev ran locally to verify the change (e.g. 'npm test', 'npm run lint'). Stage 4a re-runs these in CI.
